_comment: SEED catalyst calendar for the Edge Bake-Off catalyst-convexity pilot (Strategy #2). This is a STARTER list, NOT a research-grade dataset. To produce a credible backtest the desk must expand this with a clean, point-in-time history of scheduled binary catalysts (FDA PDUFA dates, major product/regulatory/legal events) and confirm ORATS historical option-chain coverage for each name. Sample sizes here are far too small for statistical power. Pattern mirrors data/universe/geopolitical_shocks.json.

schema.event_date: YYYY-MM-DD of the scheduled catalyst (point-in-time, known in advance)

events.note: Seed placeholder — replace with curated catalysts.
